text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, Daiwa Scarlet receives a fan letter.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: O-oh? A fan letter? For me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! If anything, there should be piles of these
on the way!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The future number one would never get all
excited for just one letter.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're just seeing things! Come on, it's time to
train!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going to make all my adoring fans proud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet is in a wonderful mood for the
entire day.
